title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know
Freight Futures Volatility Drops to 5-Year Lows as Spot Rates Remain Rangebound - Volatility has all but disappeared in the usually highly volatile freight futures market, as spot rates have remained relatively steady and any tightness or slackness in the tonnage supply have so far appeared temporary in nature. Read More
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-07-09 114111.png | assets/2024-07-12_weekly-insights-review_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_19b37e1009d9.png
Image reference: image-asset.jpeg | assets/2024-07-12_weekly-insights-review_img_image-asset_eae51596a066.jpeg
Doric Weekly Market Insight
The Baltic indices stumbled into the typically strong third quarter of the trading year with a rather uninspiring performance. Read More
Image reference: image-asset (1).jpeg | assets/2024-07-12_weekly-insights-review_img_image-asset28129_44fee34ae799.jpeg
From Commodore's Weekly Dry Bulk Reports
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly China Report, May ended with 742 million square meters of floor space available in China's commercial buildings (which includes residential buildings).
